expected_effect: Fix chronological order violation, intent mismatch, signal pollution, and consolidate adjacent retired gene entries to reduce narrative noise
rationale: Narrative has 1 chronological violation (09:53 entry after 10:10), 1 intent mismatch (INNOVATE on optimize gene), 1 signal pollution (raw user message), and 2 adjacent same-gene entries compressible into 1 CONSOLIDATED block. MEMORY.md has 2 entries consolidatable into 1 batch line.

preconditions: need stricter, auditable evolution protocol outputs
strategy: Extract signals and determine selection rationale via Selector JSON
Prefer reusing existing Gene/Capsule; only create if no match exists
Refactor prompt assembly to embed assets (genes, capsules, parent event)
Reduce noise and ambiguity; enforce strict output schema
Append cycle record to MEMORY.md history table (never overwrite existing entries)
Validate by running node index.js run and ensuring no runtime errors
Solidify: record EvolutionEvent, update Gene definitions, create Capsule on success

summary: Narrative integrity optimization: consolidated 2 adjacent retired gene entries (-6 lines), fixed 1 chronological violation (09:53→10:10 reorder), corrected 1 intent mismatch (INNOVATE→OPTIMIZE), cleaned 1 signal pollution, merged 2 MEMORY entries into batch. Narrative 129→121 lines.
